commits.author: lghassen
lines: Reduce ring mesh instances VRAM usage by allocating a single transforms buffer for all LODs, then sorting only the indexes per-LOD. Reduces VRAM usage from ~65 to 26 MB at 1440p
Clean up some of the ring mesh rendering barriers and reduce usages of FillBuffer

commits.author: Linx-RW
lines: Transcoded all planet diffuse and normal textures to BC7 and BC5 respectively. This reduces size on-disk and fixes an issue where the planet textures were not being transcoded to the correct formats at runtime, saving on VRAM significantly (around 500MB, estimated).
Updated the Moon's diffuse texture to the December 2025 CGI kit texture which includes better polar detail.

commits.author: lghassen
lines: Fix artifacts visible on the edges of ring meshes and Pan, introduced by the volumetric ring effect using derivatives

commits.author: gravhoek-rw
lines: Added a comment to clarify the limitations of GetUsing<T>().

commits.author: gravhoek-rw
lines: Added missing flag reset, the lack of which was causing spurious flight computer wakeups at high time warp.

commits.author: gravhoek-rw
lines: Split the pieces of the now-empty SubPart file into Gimbal and FxTemperature.

commits.author: gravhoek-rw
lines: Serialize missing last thruster pulse time field from the flight computer.
